prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Data/comm & security, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: bend radius violations. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: TIA-568, NEC 800.
title: Identification: Data/comm & security (residential job)
